items.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
items.title: Ministry Invites Public Comments on Draft Amendment to the Drugs Rules, 1945 to Update Testing Norms for Blood Products
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Ministry Invites Public Comments on Draft Amendment to the Drugs Rules, 1945 to Update Testing Norms for Blood Products Proposed Amendment to Drugs Rules Seeks to Remove Duplicate Viral Testing of Blood Products and Align with Global Pharmacopoeial Standards Posted On: 11 MAR 2026 9:37AM by PIB Delhi The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj on his martyrdom day
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj on his martyrdom day Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj remained committed throughout his life to preserve the legacy of Swaraj, Swadharma and Swabhasha inherited from Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Even severe sufferings could not shake Chhatrapati Sambhaj…

items.title: ESIC Celebrates International Women’s Day 2026 and Concludes Nationwide ‘Special Services Fortnight’
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Labour & Employment ESIC Celebrates International Women’s Day 2026 and Concludes Nationwide ‘Special Services Fortnight’ ‘Give to Gain’ Theme Highlights ESIC’s Commitment to ‘Niswarth Seva’ and the Welfare of Over 3.84 Crore Insured Persons Daily Health Check-ups for Workers Above 40 Years in Alignment with New Labour Codes introduced as part of Special Services Fort…
